data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying the following story done definitions:
- DD1: Outbound bridge PUTs dso.file_impact to /rest/api/3/issue/{key}/properties/dso.file_impact with correct JSON body and Authorization header
- DD4: Unit tests mock the PUT and assert credential header injection (implementation makes Task A's RED tests pass)

## TDD Requirement
Task 4e9b-6f68 (RED unit tests) must be complete and confirmed RED before this task begins. This task makes those RED tests go GREEN by implementing the two methods in AcliClient.

## Implementation Notes
Add to plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py AcliClient class (after get_myself method):

```python
def _direct_rest_put(self, path: str, data: Any) -> None:
    """PUT JSON data to a Jira REST path using stored credentials.

    Follows the same urllib pattern as get_myself().
    Raises urllib.error.HTTPError on non-2xx response.
    Spike confirmed ACLI has no issue properties subcommand.
    """
    url = f"{self.jira_url.rstrip('/')}{path}"
    creds = base64.b64encode(f"{self.user}:{self.api_token}".encode()).decode()
    body = json.dumps({"value": data}, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8")
    req = urllib.request.Request(
        url,
        data=body,
        method="PUT",
        headers={
            "Authorization": f"Basic {creds}",
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
        },
    )
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as resp:
        resp.read()

def set_issue_property(self, jira_key: str, property_key: str, value: Any) -> None:
    """Set a Jira issue property via REST PUT.

    Calls /rest/api/3/issue/{jira_key}/properties/{property_key} with value
    wrapped in {"value": ...} per the Jira issue properties API contract.
    """
    path = f"/rest/api/3/issue/{jira_key}/properties/{property_key}"
    self._direct_rest_put(path, value)
```

Key constraints:
- Match existing urllib.request pattern from get_myself() — base64 creds, urllib.request.Request, urlopen with timeout
- Jira issue properties API wraps the value in {"value": ...} JSON body
- Raises urllib.error.HTTPError on 4xx/5xx — callers handle error (BRIDGE_ALERT)
- No retry logic in _direct_rest_put (the outbound handler's try/except catches failures)
- Import base64, json, urllib.request already present in acli-integration.py

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py (add _direct_rest_put + set_issue_property to AcliClient)

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (or RED zone tolerance)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py -v 2>&1 | tail -5
- [ ] AcliClient.set_issue_property is importable
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "import importlib.util; spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('a','plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py'); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); assert hasattr(m.AcliClient,'set_issue_property')"
- [ ] AcliClient._direct_rest_put is importable
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "import importlib.util; spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('a','plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py'); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); assert hasattr(m.AcliClient,'_direct_rest_put')"
- [ ] All unit tests from task 4e9b-6f68 pass GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py -v 2>&1 | grep -E "passed" | grep -q .
- [ ] ruff check passes for modified acli-integration.py
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
data.title: Implement AcliClient._direct_rest_put() and set_issue_property() in acli-integration.py
